name: Deviled Ham Puffs
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread each croute with deviled ham paste.
2. Saute onions in butter for 2 minutes, then allow to cool.
3. Beat the cream cheese until smooth, add the remaining ingredients and beat until well combined. Spread over the ham paste.
4. Bake at 200°C for 10 minutes or until golden brown and heated. Serve immediately.
TO MAKE CRUSTS
1. Cut bread circles from sliced bread using a 5 cm scone cutter.
2. Brush both sides of each croute with melted butter and place on a baking tray.
3. Bake at 200°C for 10 minutes or until golden brown, turning during cooking time. Cool and store in an airtight container.
